title: Statistics on the one-time emergency payment increase to the Goods and Services Tax/Harmonized Sales Tax Credit (GST/HST Credit) - Open Government Portal
content:
## Statistics on the one-time emergency payment increase to the Goods and Services Tax/Harmonized Sales Tax Credit (GST/HST Credit)
Counts and amounts of entitled individuals and the total amount, demonstrated by age, gender, and province of residence. Valid at end of August 2020.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Canada Revenue Agency
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
